chapter_title.ar: بَابٌ فِي إِلْطَافِ الْمُؤْمِنِ وَ إِكْرَامِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 88 – Regarding kindness to the Momin and honouring him

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (136/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (136/ 9)
text: مَنْ قَالَ لِأَخِيهِ الْمُؤْمِنِ مَرْحَباً كَتَبَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى لَهُ مَرْحَباً إِلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Umar Bin Abdul Aziz, from Jameel Bin Darraj,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The one who says to his Momin brother, ‘Welcome!’, Allahazwj the Exalted would Write a ‘Welcome’ for him up to the Day of Judgement’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Umar ibn ‘Abd al-‘Aziz from Jamil ibn Darraj from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever says ‘Welcome’ to his brother (in belief) Allah then writes down for him ‘Welcome’ up to the Day of Judgment.”
